title: Why Switch to Linux?
checklistItems: I understand what Linux is
I know the main benefits of switching
I've watched at least one intro video

title: Choosing a Distro
newLabel: New comparison added: Ubuntu 24.04 vs Pop!_OS 22.04
checklistItems: I've read about Ubuntu
I've read about Pop!_OS
I've decided which distro to try

title: Installation Guide
checklistItems: I've created a bootable USB
I've backed up my important files
I've booted into the live environment
I've completed the installation

title: Windows vs Linux
checklistItems: I understand the file system differences
I know the software equivalents I need
I understand how updates work on Linux

title: Common Tasks
checklistItems: I can browse the web
I can manage files
I can install and remove apps
I can connect to Wi-Fi
I can adjust system settings

title: Gaming on Linux
newLabel: New section — Steam Deck & Proton guide added
checklistItems: I've installed Steam on Linux
I've checked my games on ProtonDB
I've enabled Proton in Steam settings
I've tried at least one game

title: Recommended Apps
newLabel: New section — top apps for switchers
checklistItems: I've installed my browser of choice
I've set up my email client
I've found alternatives for my key apps

title: Troubleshooting
checklistItems: I know how to search for help online
I've joined at least one Linux community

title: Community & Help
checklistItems: I've bookmarked at least one Linux community
I've introduced myself in a forum or subreddit
